TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_tjumaljiaqaljan_a_caucau, title = tjumaljiaqaljan_a_caucau, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/tjumaljiaqaljan_a_caucau} }

S.FORM: sipapukeljang i caviljan a 1942 aicu a sinansunatj a tjumaljiaqaljan a caucau (pinaka L'Étranger) mavan a sangasangasan a sinantjaucikel ni Albert Camus. == kasizuanan ==
S.PHON: sipapukəʎaŋ i ʦaviʎan a **** aiʦu a sinansunaʦ a ʦumaʎiaqaʎan a ʦauʦau (pinaka ɭʔ*traŋər) mavan a saŋasaŋasan a sinanʦauʦikəɭ ni aɭbərt ʦamus. == kasizuanan ==
S.FORM: sipapukeljang i caviljan a 1942 aicu a sinansunatj a tjumaljiaqaljan a caucau (pinaka L'Étranger) mavan a sangasangasan a sinantjaucikel ni Albert Camus. == kasizuanan ==
S.PHON: sipapukəʎaŋ i ʦaviʎan a **** aiʦu a sinansunaʦ a ʦumaʎiaqaʎan a ʦauʦau (pinaka ɭʔ*traŋər) mavan a saŋasaŋasan a sinanʦauʦikəɭ ni aɭbərt ʦamus. == kasizuanan ==
